title: Falafel Crunchy Wrap
description: A smoky and crunchy Cantonese-inspired brunch dish featuring seasoned falafel wrapped in a fluffy rice noodle wrap for a mediterranean-friendly twist.
instructions: Rinse quinoa in a fine mesh strainer, then drain. Rinse chickpeas thoroughly with cold water and drain well.
In a medium saucepan, bring water to a boil. Add quinoa and reduce heat; cover and simmer for about 12 minutes or until the liquid is absorbed.

While quinoa cooks, in a food processor combine chickpeas, garlic, cumin, smoked paprika, salt, and pepper. Process until smooth and add parsley for extra freshness. If too thick, thin with water as needed.
Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium heat. Add the chickpea mixture and stir-fry until crisp and golden brown, about 5 minutes.
To assemble wrap, place a handful of cooked quinoa at the bottom of each wrap. Top with falafel, sliced tomatoes, and shredded lettuce. Drizzle with olive oil and lemon juice for extra flavor.
